brief_justification: Agent correctly traces all three cycles to arrive at B=0 matching ground truth; goes one level beyond surface by explaining the balancing loop kill mechanism but doesn't trace second/third-order effects; no explicit monitoring of own reasoning process or named bias checks during execution; table provides systematic computation but no cross-verification from a different derivation angle; acknowledges D_boost condition as a specific conditional observation but no structured uncertainty framing; notes D_boost possibility vs. never-activated but doesn't evaluate alternative loop dynamics; every cycle step is shown in the table with full derivation reproducible by a third party; explicitly identifies the balancing loop and explains its self-terminating behavior, avoiding linear causation anti-pattern; avoids all suppressed failure modes including linear causation, loop blindness, and assumed convergence, grounding convergence in mechanism; follows topology in identifying circular causal path and equilibrium but doesn't map each gate/branch explicitly to the topology nodes
